So what we've worked on is it's basically it sits in front of the website on a CDN that when traffic comes in, if it's a bot traffic, we're going to help you create an optimized AI view of your website so that we serve up AI optimized content to the bot, make sure that it's getting the information it needs so that you show up in responses.
